summary: Second iteration validates the new Contact form fields (service/tier/budget), the pricing & identity CTA → contact auto-fill, the footer copyright and the featured (tier 2) card dark-theme rendering. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass (updated test_api.py for new service field and RESEND_API_KEY now configured — email_configured=true, and a direct curl confirmed email_sent=true). Frontend: all target data-testids render, conditional tier rendering works for both services, switching services swaps the tier group and clears the stale selection, budget chips highlight correctly, pricing 'Multi Page' CTA auto-selects Website+Multi Page, identity 'Professional Brand' CTA auto-selects Brand Identity+Professional Brand. Featured cards (Multi Page & Professional Brand) computed background = rgb(5,5,5) with white headings — rendering correctly. Footer shows exactly '© 2026 Z-DIGITAL SOLUTIONS. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.' (uppercase via CSS) with no 'Made in Bangalore' text. Final form submission shows Sonner toast with title 'Success' and description 'Thanks! The Z-Digital team will get back to you within 24 hours.'
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) is duplicated at both top of file and bottom (lines 19-23 and 190-194). Cleanup is safe — the late block is a no-op but clutters the file.
server.py still uses the deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'). Migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.

Contact.jsx: the tier-reset useEffect includes form.tier in its deps but also sets form.tier — works today because the new tier is always in `allowed`, but it's fragile. Consider keying the reset solely on form.service.

Contact.jsx: POST sends raw label strings ('₹30,000', 'Multi Page'). Fine for a notification email but would be nicer to also send the stable machine keys (service/tier/budget key) so reporting/filters aren't tied to display copy. Not a blocker.
No backend rate-limit / anti-spam on POST /api/contact. Since the endpoint now triggers real Resend sends, consider a simple IP-based throttle or hCaptcha before going fully public.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (added tests for new service field, brand identity payload, minimal payload, and email_configured=true)
seed_data_creation: Additional TEST_ prefixed inquiries were created in the 'inquiries' collection during test runs (TEST_Alice, TEST_Brand, TEST_Min, TEST_sort_0/1, TEST_EmailCheck, TEST_PlaywrightUser). They can be cleaned up safely via `db.inquiries.deleteMany({name: /^TEST_/})`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run backend tests with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://agency-portfolio-50.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_api.py -v. RESEND_API_KEY is now live — POST /api/contact returns email_sent=true. Frontend tests rely on data-testids: contact-service-website/brand, contact-tier-{one-page|multi-page|special-apis|starter-identity|professional-brand|established-clinic}, contact-budget-{30k|50k|1lakh}, pricing-cta-*, identity-cta-*. All implemented fields/flows verified green in this iteration.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 9 backend API cases and all 8 frontend feature/bugs listed in the review request pass.
